title: FakeModMod
description: Generate empty mods at runtime, and put randomized messages in the names of them. Why not?
body:
## FakeModMod

_Generate some number of (virtual, empty) mods with configurable names every time the game launches._

Heavily inspired by [JFronny's Modsmod](https://modrinth.com/mod/modsmod)

Configuration is done through `.minecraft/config/fmm_picker.json`.

An example configuration looks like this:

```json
{
  "entries": [
    [
      "Message number 1",
      "Look, I'm a mod",
      "Me too!",
      "(each string becomes a mod)"
    ],
    [
      "Message number 2",
      "Here's the second message",
      "A message is picked at random from the 'entries' list",
      "Every time the game is launched",
      "Wow"
    ]
  ]
}
```

In this example, the mod will randomly pick between the first and second message each time the game launches.
